title: Spicy Quesadilla Delight
description: A delicious and spicy twist on the classic quesadilla, perfect for a quick dinner.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium heat.
Butter one side of each tortilla.
Place one tortilla, buttered side down, in the skillet.
Sprinkle roasted chili on half of the tortilla.
Sprinkle shredded cheese on top of the chili.
Fold the tortilla in half to enclose the filling.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the tortilla is crispy and the cheese is melted.
Flip the quesadilla and cook for another 2-3 minutes or until the other side is crispy.
Repeat with the remaining tortillas and filling.
Cut the quesadillas into wedges and serve hot.
